NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into on this 1st day of October 2023, by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC No. S2345678Z, residing at 123 Orchard Lane, Singapore 238567, and GreenTech Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN 202312345G, with its principal place of business at 456 Marina Bay, Singapore 018987, represented by Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC No. S3456789A. Contact details: +65 6123 4567, email: contact@greentech.sg.

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. For the purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any and all information, whether written, electronic, or oral, disclosed by one party to the other, which is designated as confidential or that reasonably should be understood to be confidential given the nature of the information. Notwithstanding the foregoing, Confidential Information shall not include information that is publicly known or becomes publicly known through no wrongful act of the receiving party.

2. OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES. Each party agrees to (a) maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information using the same degree of care as it uses for its own confidential information, but in no event less than reasonable care, and (b) use the Confidential Information solely for the purpose of evaluating a potential business relationship. The parties agree that disclosure of the project plan or project status does not constitute Confidential Information under this Agreement.

Any breach by either party of this Agreement may result in irreparable damage for which monetary damages would not be a sufficient remedy. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Singapore. For more information visit: https://example.sg/user/S2345678Z.
